creator: olafs@cs.ru.nl
text:
Hi Stefan,

On Tue 27 Jan 2009 at 15:13:43 +0100, Stefan Walter wrote:
> what I meant to say in my last followup to ports/128603 [1] was that - if
> you want to provide a patch for the textproc/flex port that changes the
> limit to 99999 optionally, I would commit it.

Ok, thanks. I haven't had time to look at it yet, that's mainly why I
haven't replied yet. I hope to be able to spend some time on it within a
week or so.

> Regards,
> Stefan
> 
> [1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/128603
-Olaf.
--
